creative.name: Creative Writing
creative.description: Prompts for storytelling, narrative creation, and creative content

prompts.title: Character Development Generator
prompts.description: Create detailed, compelling characters with consistent personalities and backgrounds.
prompts.example: A mysterious detective who hides a supernatural ability, working in a steampunk noir city
prompts.useCase: Fiction writing, character-driven narratives, screenplay development

prompts.title: Story Plot Generator
prompts.description: Generate unique plot ideas with tension, conflict, and narrative arc.
prompts.example: A heist story set in a future where memories can be stolen and sold
prompts.useCase: Novel outlines, short stories, creative brainstorming

prompts.title: Dialogue Enhancement
prompts.description: Create authentic character dialogue that reveals personality and advances the plot.
prompts.example: Banter between rivals who must work together to survive
prompts.useCase: Screenplay writing, novel dialogue, creative storytelling

prompts.title: World Building Assistant
prompts.description: Build cohesive fictional worlds with consistent rules, cultures, and histories.
prompts.example: A floating city suspended in clouds with its own ecosystem and civilization
prompts.useCase: Fantasy worldbuilding, sci-fi settings, immersive storytelling

business.name: Business
business.description: Professional prompts for business communication and strategy

prompts.title: Executive Summary Writer
prompts.description: Generate concise, impactful executive summaries for reports and proposals.
prompts.example: Software as a Service (SaaS) platform summary for investor pitch
prompts.useCase: Business proposals, investor pitches, executive reports

prompts.title: Email Communication Optimizer
prompts.description: Craft professional, persuasive emails for various business scenarios.
prompts.example: Follow-up email after a networking event
prompts.useCase: Client communication, business development, internal emails

prompts.title: Business Strategy Analyzer
prompts.description: Analyze business scenarios and develop strategic recommendations.
prompts.example: Market entry strategy for a new product in competitive space
prompts.useCase: Strategic planning, market analysis, business decisions

technical.name: Technical
technical.description: Technical prompts for developers and technical professionals

prompts.title: Code Generation & Debugging
prompts.description: Generate code snippets or debug existing code with explanations.
prompts.example: React component for user authentication with error handling
prompts.useCase: Software development, code optimization, learning programming

prompts.title: Technical Documentation
prompts.description: Create clear, comprehensive technical documentation for projects.
prompts.example: API documentation for a RESTful backend service
prompts.useCase: Project documentation, API guides, technical specifications

prompts.title: System Architecture Designer
prompts.description: Design scalable system architectures for different requirements.
prompts.example: Microservices architecture for high-traffic e-commerce platform
prompts.useCase: System design, architecture planning, technical interviews

marketing.name: Marketing
marketing.description: Marketing-focused prompts for campaigns and audience engagement

prompts.title: Copywriting for Campaigns
prompts.description: Write compelling marketing copy that converts readers to customers.
prompts.example: Landing page headline and description for SaaS product
prompts.useCase: Marketing campaigns, landing pages, social media ads

prompts.title: Social Media Content Strategy
prompts.description: Generate engaging social media content ideas and strategies.
prompts.example: LinkedIn content calendar for a B2B tech company
prompts.useCase: Social media marketing, content planning, audience engagement

prompts.title: Customer Analysis
prompts.description: Analyze target audiences and develop customer personas.
prompts.example: Detailed buyer persona for a productivity SaaS tool
prompts.useCase: Market research, customer targeting, product development

prompts.title: Brand Voice Developer
prompts.description: Define and maintain consistent brand voice across platforms.
prompts.example: Brand voice guidelines for a sustainable fashion startup
prompts.useCase: Brand development, content consistency, marketing strategy
